latest_evidence_summary: Dashboard snapshot and inspect panels now expose goal dossier and criterion dossier paths so users can trace Goal and AC nodes back to .opennori/current/<goal>/contract.json, ledger.json, README.md, and criteria/<AC-id>/{README.md,criterion.json,status.json,evidence,artifacts}. Plugin cache was synced locally from 0.1.9 to 0.1.10 with opennori plugin sync --local --confirm.
